---
title: "Winfred Dotse-G"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image: Winfred_headshot.jpg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: index_style.css
---

### **Welcome!**

::: {#hero-heading}
I'm a multidisciplinary academic specialising in **spatial epidemiology** at [**University College London**](https://profiles.ucl.ac.uk/104586-winfred-dotsegborgbortsi/about), with over 15 years of experience in **public health intelligence and research**.

My career spans both academia and practice. I’ve held a **Senior Research Fellowship** with the [**WorldPop Research Group**](https://www.worldpop.org/about/) at the University of Southampton, and previously worked with the **Ghana Health Service** as a Public Health Officer. I also led monitoring and evaluation at **Good Neighbors Ghana**.

My work focuses on using data and spatial analysis to inform public health decisions and policy.

Feel free to explore my research, publications, and ongoing projects.
:::

### Consultancy Services

::: callout-important
In addition to my academic work, I offer consultancy services to support organizations in:

-   **Upskilling teams in geospatial analysis**

-   **Designing and conducting quantitative or mixed methods research**

-   **Data analysis for research and public health projects**

-   **Developing interactive dashboards to communicate research findings and other information**

If you're interested in collaborating or learning more, feel free to get in touch

Email: winfredotse\@outlook.com
:::
